summary: Matched two stage functions: grOldPupupu_80211110 in groldpupupu.c and grRCruise_80201B60 in grrcruise.c. The PR body states both were 100% matched. The changes replace nonmatching stubs with C implementations, add needed material/DObj includes, and tighten the grRCruise_80201B60 header prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void(HSD_JObj*, s32).

key_files.role: Matched grOldPupupu_80211110; added gr/grmaterial.h include for grMaterial_801C8858.
Matched grRCruise_80201B60; added baselib dobj header and implemented DObj flag iteration.
Updated grRCruise_80201B60 prototype from unknown return/params to void(HSD_JObj*, s32).

what_changed: Implemented grOldPupupu_80211110(Ground_GObj* gobj), replacing a nonmatching marker.

grOldPupupu_80211110 reads Ground from gobj->user_data and HSD_JObj from gobj->hsd_obj, calls grAnime_801C8138(gobj, gp->map_id, 0), clears x10_flags.b2, calls grMaterial_801C8858(jobj, 0x28000000U), then sets x11_flags.b012 to 2.
Added #include "gr/grmaterial.h" in groldpupupu.c to support the material call.
Implemented grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj* jobj, s32 arg1), replacing a nonmatching marker.
grRCruise_80201B60 gets the first DObj from HSD_JObjGetDObj(jobj), walks the dobj->next chain, and either clears or sets flag 1U depending on whether arg1 is nonzero.
Added #include <sysdolphin/baselib/dobj.h> in grrcruise.c for HSD_DObj access and DObj flag APIs.
Changed grRCruise_80201B60 declaration in grrcruise.h from UNK_RET grRCruise_80201B60(UNK_PARAMS) to void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj*, s32).
smart_moves: Resolved a stage material operation by including grmaterial.h and using the existing grMaterial_801C8858 helper instead of open-coding material state changes.
Used concrete HSD_DObj typing and the baselib dobj header to expose dobj->next and the HSD_DObjClearFlags/HSD_DObjSetFlags APIs cleanly.

The grRCruise loop keeps an apparently redundant inner null check before reading dobj->next even though the while condition already checked dobj; this is likely a codegen-preserving structure for matching.
The Old Pupupu implementation uses both a cached Ground* and an explicit ((Ground*) gobj->user_data) access for one flag write, which may preserve the original load pattern needed for a match.
Updated the public header prototype once argument and return types were known, reducing future UNK_PARAMS usage around grRCruise_80201B60.
decomp_lessons: For stage functions that manipulate render/material state, look for existing grMaterial_* helpers before introducing lower-level HSD material logic.
When matching JObj/DObj traversal, include the baselib dobj header so DObj fields and flag helpers can be typed directly.
Do not simplify control flow too aggressively in matched stage code; redundant null checks and specific temporary variables can be intentional matching artifacts.
Stage init/update functions often combine animation setup, Ground flag bitfield writes, and material flag configuration in a small fixed sequence.
Once a function is matched, propagate known signatures into headers to replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS and improve callsite typing.
naming_conventions: Stage symbols retain the gr<StageName>_<address> format, e.g. grOldPupupu_80211110 and grRCruise_80201B60.
Ground object parameters are typed as Ground_GObj* when the function operates on stage ground GObjs.
HSD object graph parameters are typed with concrete baselib types such as HSD_JObj* and HSD_DObj* when known.
Local or less-identified helper names such as fn_80201BE0 were not renamed in this PR.
Bitfield names from Ground are used directly, e.g. x10_flags.b2 and x11_flags.b012.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK(16) in grOldPupupu_80211110 and PAD_STACK(8) in grRCruise_80201B60 to satisfy stack layout/matching requirements.
Preserved an explicit reload/cast of gobj->user_data for the x10_flags.b2 write in grOldPupupu_80211110 instead of only using the cached Ground*.
Structured grRCruise_80201B60 as a while loop over HSD_DObj nodes with a separate next temporary.
Kept the if (dobj != NULL) next = dobj->next; else next = NULL; block inside a loop already guarded by dobj != NULL, suggesting a deliberate match-oriented control-flow shape.
Used unsigned constants 0x28000000U and 1U in helper calls, matching expected literal typing.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided slice.
The PR text only states the matched functions and reports: All 100% matched.
follow_up_queries: Find other stage functions that call grMaterial_801C8858 with 0x28000000U.
Search for remaining UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations in grrcruise.h.
Compare other HSD_DObj flag traversal functions for the same redundant null-check matching pattern.
Look for neighboring nonmatched Old Pupupu functions around grOldPupupu_80211110 and grOldPupupu_8021118C.
Search for other stage functions using x10_flags.b2 and x11_flags.b012 to infer Ground flag semantics.
